title: Optimized Survival
description: The official modpack of Optimized Survival pack by JaggerGTV!
body:
Optimized Survival is a Modpack for anyone, even if you aren't wanting to play Survival! We have resource packs and shaders in this Modpack that are all **OPTIONAL** I wanted to make this modpack for people who don't have as good computers/PC's so people could play some modpacks somewhat smoothly. If you are someone who really likes to play survival with a lot of custom world generation, then this is the pack for you!

When it comes to hosting servers, I always trust BisectHosting. New customers can use https://www.bisecthosting.com/JaggerGTV to save 25% on their first month of a gaming server, and their dedicated support team is available 24/7 to provide you with top-notch assistance.
